appContext.businessDomain: E-commerce for Dairy Milk and Fresh Vegetables
appContext.interactionGoals: Seamless customer experience for ordering and efficient backend management for inventory and sales.

generate: Consistent UI screens for customers based on the JSON design system.
Intuitive web dashboard interface for sellers to monitor sales and inventory.
Clear navigational patterns aligning with customer and seller needs.
Responsive design adaptable across multiple devices.
Implement backend logic and data management for orders, inventory tracking, and sales analytics.
Integration with secure payment gateways and order management systems.
promptInstructions.styleReference: Refer strictly to the provided JSON structured design system (Milkapp Visual Design Profile) for visual consistency.
promptInstructions.buildInstructions: Develop comprehensive frontend and backend solutions ensuring full application functionality from user interaction to backend data management.
